import{Networks,TransactionBuilder,BASE_FEE}from'@stellar/stellar-sdk';import{isConnected,getAddress,signTransaction}from'@stellar/freighter-api';const NETWORK_PASSPHRASE=Networks.TESTNET;const RPC_URL='https://soroban-testnet.stellar.org:443';const CONTRACT_ID='YOUR_CONTRACT_ID_HERE';let walletAddress=null;export async function initWallet(){const connected=await isConnected();if(connected){walletAddress=await getAddress();}return walletAddress;}export async function getWalletAddress(){if(!walletAddress){walletAddress=await getAddress();}return walletAddress;}// Mock function to simulate calling the contract
export async function callContract(method){let args=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};const address=await getWalletAddress();const funcMap={mint_nft:'mint_nft',transfer_shares:'transfer_shares',burn_nft:'burn_nft',view_nft:'view_nft',view_shares:'view_shares',view_platform_stats:'view_platform_stats'};return{method:funcMap[method]||method,args,address};}// Mock functions to simulate contract calls for demo purposes
export async function simulateMintNFT(creatorId,title,descrip,totalShares){const address=await getWalletAddress();return{method:'mint_nft',creator_id:creatorId,title,descrip,total_shares:totalShares,source:address};}export async function simulateTransferShares(nftId,fromId,toId,amount){const address=await getWalletAddress();return{method:'transfer_shares',nft_id:nftId,from_id:fromId,to_id:toId,amount,source:address};}export async function simulateBurnNFT(nftId,burnerId){const address=await getWalletAddress();return{method:'burn_nft',nft_id:nftId,burner_id:burnerId,source:address};}// Data parsing functions
export function parseNFTData(result){if(!result)return null;try{if(result.nft_id&&result.nft_id!==0){return{nftId:Number(result.nft_id),title:result.title||'Unknown',descrip:result.descrip||'',totalShares:Number(result.total_shares),ownerShares:Number(result.owner_shares),isActive:result.is_active,createdAt:Number(result.created_at)};}}catch(e){console.error('Error parsing NFT data:',e);}return null;}export function parseShareHolderData(result){if(!result)return null;return{nftId:Number(result.nft_id),holderId:Number(result.holder_id),shares:Number(result.shares)};}export function parsePlatformStats(result){if(!result)return{totalNfts:0,totalTransfers:0,activeNfts:0};return{totalNfts:Number(result.total_nfts),totalTransfers:Number(result.total_transfers),activeNfts:Number(result.active_nfts)};}export function getContractId(){return CONTRACT_ID;}export function getNetwork(){return NETWORK_PASSPHRASE;}
